overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from an elevated pedestrian promenade with views of a massive corporate tower, descends to an industrial waterfront area with large pipes and canals, then ascends to a sunlit plaza featuring a gas station and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian promenade with corporate tower view

events.description: passing close to a pedestrian in a plaid shirt and hat walking toward the camera
beginning to turn left at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated pedestrian promenade toward the megatower, glancing at pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in plaid shirt and hat walking toward the camera
group of people sitting on a concrete bench

entered.detail: massive cylindrical corporate tower with multiple rings and lights
curved monorail or highway track suspended above the street
large rectangular planter with spiky vegetation on top
tall building with reflective glass facade
concrete bench with several people sitting and conversing

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide elevated pedestrian promenade with orange paving stones. The massive megatower dominates the center horizon while an elevated highway curves overhead. Pedestrians walk in scattered directions, and a group sits on a bench to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with large pipes and canal

events.description: descending from elevated promenade to lower industrial waterfront level
moving into shadow beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: turning left and descending a concrete ramp alongside large industrial pipes toward the water

entered.detail: large rusted industrial pipes running parallel to the walkway
descending concrete walkway with metal railings
large holographic advertisement of a coiled serpent or fish
dark concrete overpass creating shadow over the path

segments.scene_description: Descending a ramp into a lower industrial area characterized by massive pipes and a water canal. The lighting shifts as the camera moves under an overpass structure. A large holographic serpent advertisement is visible in the distance across the water.

events.description: turning right to follow the canal walkway
ascending ramp back to upper street level

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial canal and turning right to ascend back toward the main street level

entered.detail: tall industrial building with large white 06 signage
low commercial building with green and yellow trim
tall palm trees lining the plaza area

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the shadowed industrial canal walkway before turning right. The environment transitions as the camera ascends a ramp, revealing a gas station building and a tower marked 06 in the distance, with palm trees becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with gas station and palm trees

events.description: emerging from industrial area into sunlit gas station plaza
navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic crossing the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past the gas station, moving through groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink outfit walking across the plaza

entered.detail: open paved area with scattered street furniture
tall modern street lamp with orange fixture

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a bright sunlit plaza with the gas station now prominent. The space opens up with palm trees and moderate pedestrian traffic moving in various directions. The camera continues forward through the plaza with the megatower visible in the far distance and tower 06 on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a towering corporate promenade down into a shadowed industrial zone before emerging into a bright, sunlit plaza. It begins on a wide pedestrian walkway with orange paving stones, moving beneath a curving highway with a massive megatower dominating the horizon. As the camera descends a ramp, the environment shifts into a lower industrial area characterized by massive pipes and a water canal, where a holographic serpent advertisement glows in the distance under the shade of an overpass. The scene then transitions as the camera follows the canal walkway and ascends another ramp, gradually revealing palm trees and a distant tower marked 06. Finally, the view opens into a bright plaza featuring a prominent gas station and scattered pedestrians, with the megatower remaining a distant silhouette against the clear sky.
